item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Di Indonesia, nilai kolektif memang menjadi prioritas utama, tetapi hal ini sering kali melupakan hak-hak dasar individu.

notes: Agent A begins by agreeing that collective interests are often prioritized, then shifts at turn 3 and turn 5 toward a critique of collective-priority policy as neglecting individual needs and causing injustice. Agent B begins with balance/coexistence and ends somewhat more supportive of public-good priority in crisis or national-unity contexts, while still preserving a balance frame.
